.fees.title: 💸 P2P Fee Structure
.fees.desc:
**1. Vault Verified (With KYC):** $0 Fee 🛡️
**2. Non-KYC Trade:** $3 Fee ⚠️

*To enjoy 0 fees, please complete your Advanced KYC at the Exchange Desk.*

.time.title: ⏳ Estimated Transaction Time
.time.desc:
**Crypto Transfers:** Instant ⚡
**IMPS (Bank Transfer):** Approx 1 Hour 🏦
**CDM (Cash Deposit):** 1 to 4 Hours 🏧

*Please be patient while our Admins process your secure transfer.*

.kyc.title: 🛡️ How to do Advanced KYC?
.kyc.desc:
To unlock **$0 Fee** trades, you need the **Vault Verified** tag.

Please go to the verification channel <#1511636240729116773> and click **Start Advanced KYC**. You will need to securely upload a clear photo of your Aadhaar (Front & Back) and PAN Card.

.trade.title: 🚀 How to Start a Trade?
.trade.desc:
We **DO NOT** trade in DMs. All trades happen securely inside the Vault.

👉 Go to our Exchange Desk channel <#1503666259244482642>.
👉 Click the **🚀 Start Trade** button.
👉 Follow the steps to open your secure private ticket.

.min.title: ⚖️ Minimum Trade Limits
.min.desc:
**Buy USDT (Pay INR):** Minimum $100 🟢
**Sell USDT (Get INR):** Minimum $50 🔴

*Please ensure your trade amount meets these network limits before opening a ticket.*

.up.title: 🪪 Hi There!
.up.desc: **Hi There please upload related documents so that we can Verify you!**
